notes:
The Navy invested limited resources into developing optical sights for rifles.
This is quite interesting considering that this technology was at the time in its
infancy and the Navy wasn’t the branch that had much use for optical sights, considering the Marine Corps
was already a seperate branch. Worthy of further research.
